roadmap.title: Build the farm and track every season
roadmap.description: Raise skills and friendships while saving one of every museum find, shipping tracked crops, learning recipes, completing requests, and attending the Fair and Luau. Choose the Community Center route on the main save.

roadmap.title: Finish the valley collections
roadmap.description: Complete the Community Center, maximum farmhouse, marriage and children, museum, cooking, crafting, fishing, friendships, books, requests, shipment collections, and Monster Eradication Goals.

roadmap.title: Clear Ginger Island and perfection
roadmap.description: Repair Willy's boat, unlock Qi's Walnut Room, complete the dangerous Mines and Infinity weapon, finish nine raccoon requests, then meet every Perfection Tracker requirement and visit the Summit.

roadmap.title: Use a Joja save and finish the arcade
roadmap.description: On a separate save, buy the Joja membership and all five developments. Clear Journey of the Prairie King, then use level checkpoints and day reloads for a no-death clear.

achievements.summary: Accumulate @mechanic{15,000g in lifetime farm earnings} on one save.

guide.context: The counter uses gross earnings across the save, so purchases never remove progress.

steps.text: Sell crops, forage, fish, or crafted goods until total farm earnings reach 15,000g; the achievement unlocks when the earnings threshold is recorded.

achievements.summary: Accumulate @mechanic{50,000g in lifetime farm earnings} on one save.

guide.context: Money already spent still belongs to the cumulative earnings total.

steps.text: Continue selling farm products and other goods until total farm earnings reach 50,000g.

achievements.summary: Accumulate @mechanic{250,000g in lifetime farm earnings} on one save.

guide.context: The required value is cumulative revenue rather than cash currently carried.

steps.text: Expand reliable income sources and keep selling goods until total farm earnings reach 250,000g.

achievements.summary: Accumulate @mechanic{1,000,000g in lifetime farm earnings} on one save.

guide.context: High-value artisan production advances this total while also funding late-game buildings.

steps.text: Process and sell valuable farm goods until the cumulative earnings counter reaches 1,000,000g.

achievements.summary: Accumulate @mechanic{10,000,000g in lifetime farm earnings} on one save.

guide.context: This hidden milestone measures all revenue earned, so the 10,000,000g does not need to remain in the wallet.

steps.text: Maintain large-scale crop and artisan production until cumulative farm earnings reach 10,000,000g.

achievements.summary: Donate all @mechanic{95 unique Artifacts and Minerals} to @loc{the Museum in southeast Pelican Town}.

guide.context: The complete collection consists of 53 Minerals and 42 Artifacts; only one copy of each can be donated.

steps.text: Keep every item whose inventory description says that Gunther can tell you more about it, because that message marks an undonated museum item.
Visit the Museum between 8:00am and 6:00pm, choose the donation interaction at Gunther's counter, and place every missing item until all 95 unique slots are represented.

achievements.description: Reach a 5-heart friend level with someone.
achievements.summary: Raise @mechanic{one villager's friendship to 5 hearts} through conversations, gifts, quests, or events.

guide.context: Each heart equals 250 friendship points, and the Social tab displays current progress.

steps.text: Choose an accessible villager, talk to that villager daily, and give up to two liked or loved gifts each week until the Social tab shows 5 hearts.

achievements.description: Reach a 10-heart friend level with someone.
achievements.summary: Raise @mechanic{one person's friendship to 10 hearts}; give a datable villager a @item{Bouquet} after 8 hearts.

guide.context: Non-datable villagers can reach 10 hearts directly, while marriage candidates are capped at 8 without a Bouquet.

steps.text: Continue daily conversations, preferred gifts, birthday gifts, quests, and heart events with one person until the Social tab shows 10 hearts.

achievements.description: Reach a 10-heart friend level with 8 people.
achievements.summary: Raise @mechanic{eight different people to 10 hearts}, using @item{Bouquets} to lift datable villagers' 8-heart caps.

guide.context: Full heart meters stop ordinary friendship decay, so completing one person at a time can reduce upkeep.

steps.text: Track eight targets in the Social tab and build each relationship with conversations, two weekly gifts, birthday bonuses, quests, and helpful event choices.
Give a Bouquet to any selected marriage candidate at 8 hearts, then continue until all eight selected people display 10 hearts.

achievements.description: Reach a 5-heart friend level with 4 people.
achievements.summary: Raise @mechanic{four different people to at least 5 hearts} and verify all four meters in the Social tab.

guide.context: Loved birthday gifts receive an eightfold friendship multiplier and can accelerate early targets.

steps.text: Talk to four selected villagers regularly and use liked or loved gifts until each of their Social-tab meters reaches 5 hearts.

achievements.description: Reach a 5-heart friend level with 10 people.
achievements.summary: Raise @mechanic{ten different people to at least 5 hearts} and verify every meter in the Social tab.

guide.context: Completing item-delivery requests adds friendship while also advancing the Help Wanted achievements.

steps.text: Maintain ten relationships through daily conversations, weekly gifts, birthdays, quests, movies, and favorable heart-event choices until all ten show 5 hearts.

achievements.description: Reach a 5-heart friend level with 20 people.
achievements.summary: Raise @mechanic{twenty different people to at least 5 hearts} and verify every meter in the Social tab.

guide.context: Children can count toward friendship achievements, but ordinary villagers offer more predictable daily conversations and gifts.

steps.text: Use the Social tab as a checklist and continue talking, gifting, and completing requests until twenty separate people display at least 5 hearts.

achievements.summary: Use the @loc{farmhouse kitchen} to cook @mechanic{10 different recipes} after completing the first house upgrade.

guide.context: Purchased or gifted meals do not substitute for preparing recipes through a cooking interface.

steps.text: Buy Farmhouse Upgrade 1 from Robin for 10,000g and 450 Wood, then wait three construction days for the kitchen.
Learn at least ten recipes, place their ingredients in inventory or the refrigerator, and prepare each distinct recipe once at the stove.

achievements.summary: Prepare @mechanic{25 different recipes} through the farmhouse stove or another cooking interface.

guide.context: Recipe knowledge comes from The Queen of Sauce, friendships, skill levels, shops, and progression rewards.

steps.text: Collect at least 25 recipes and stock the exact ingredients shown in the cooking menu.
Cook every selected recipe once until 25 different prepared dishes are registered.

achievements.summary: Learn and personally cook all @mechanic{81 recipes}, including television, friendship, shop, skill, and late-game recipes.

guide.context: The Queen of Sauce runs scheduled recipes on Sundays and reruns on Wednesdays; friendship mail and Ginger Island supply other easy-to-miss recipes.

steps.text: Complete the recipe list by watching The Queen of Sauce, raising required friendships, reaching skill levels, and buying or earning every remaining recipe.
Use the Collections cooking page to identify unmade dishes, gather each recipe's ingredients, and cook every blank entry once.

achievements.summary: Buy @mechanic{Farmhouse Upgrade 1} from @npc{Robin} for @mechanic{10,000g and 450 Wood}.

guide.context: Robin takes three days to finish the upgrade, which adds a kitchen, refrigerator, bedroom, and double bed.

steps.text: Bring 10,000g and 450 Wood to the Carpenter's Shop, open Robin's construction menu, and purchase the first farmhouse upgrade.
Let three construction days pass; the achievement registers when the upgraded farmhouse is completed.

achievements.description: Upgrade your house to the maximum size.
achievements.summary: After the first house upgrade, buy @mechanic{Farmhouse Upgrade 2} from @npc{Robin} for @mechanic{65,000g and 100 Hardwood}.

guide.context: The second upgrade adds the nursery and counts as maximum house size for this achievement; the later Cellar is unnecessary.

steps.text: Bring 65,000g and 100 Hardwood to the Carpenter's Shop and select the second farmhouse upgrade from Robin's menu.
Allow Robin three construction days to finish the nursery upgrade and trigger the achievement.

achievements.summary: Craft @mechanic{15 different recipes} from the Crafting tab; duplicate copies do not add distinct progress.

guide.context: Options > Show Advanced Crafting Information adds a crafted-count tooltip to every recipe.

steps.text: Enable Show Advanced Crafting Information and inspect the Crafting tab for recipes with a zero crafted count.
Gather the displayed materials and make one copy of 15 different recipes.

achievements.summary: Craft @mechanic{30 different recipes} from the Crafting tab and confirm a nonzero count on each recipe.

guide.context: New recipes unlock through skill levels, purchases, friendships, quests, and story progression.

steps.text: Use Show Advanced Crafting Information to select 30 recipes with zero counts, obtain their required materials, and craft each one once.

achievements.summary: Unlock and craft all @mechanic{149 required recipes}; the multiplayer-only @item{Wedding Ring} is excluded.

guide.context: Complete recipe access spans all five skills and Masteries, Ginger Island, friendships, shops, festivals, Special Orders, and other progression rewards.

steps.text: Acquire every crafting recipe from levels, Masteries, villagers, merchants, festivals, quests, Special Orders, and Ginger Island sources.
Enable Options > Show Advanced Crafting Information and inspect every Crafting-tab recipe for a zero crafted count.
Gather materials and craft each zero-count recipe once until every required recipe shows at least one crafted; ignore the Wedding Ring.

achievements.summary: Personally record @mechanic{10 different Collections > Fish entries} by catching fish, Green or White Algae, Seaweed, or Jelly.

guide.context: Cave, River, and Sea Jelly each count as distinct entries alongside both Algae types and Seaweed; trash does not.

steps.text: Fish in several early locations and keep catching new fish, Algae, Seaweed, or Jelly until ten distinct Collections > Fish entries are recorded.

achievements.summary: Personally record @mechanic{24 different Collections > Fish entries} by catching fish, Green or White Algae, Seaweed, or Jelly.

guide.context: Fish availability varies by water, season, time, and weather, so rotating locations prevents duplicate-only progress.

steps.text: Use Collections > Fish to identify missing silhouettes, then fish in the required waters and conditions until 24 distinct entries are recorded.

achievements.summary: Personally catch every @mechanic{fish listed in Collections > Fish}; @warn{Extended Family quest fish are excluded}.

guide.context: Magic Bait removes ordinary season, time, and weather restrictions, but each fish still requires its correct body of water and some require unlocked regions.

steps.text: Audit Collections > Fish and record each missing species with its location, season, time, weather, and access requirement.
Catch the standard, Night Market, legendary, mine, desert, sewer, forest, and Ginger Island fish in their required locations; use Magic Bait when convenient.
Fill every required Fish-tab silhouette; Willy mails the related Stardrop on the following day.

achievements.summary: Complete @mechanic{100 total catches of fish, Green or White Algae, Seaweed, or Jelly}; repeated catches count.

guide.context: Unlike the distinct-species achievements, this counter rewards quantity and can be advanced in any reliable fishing spot.

steps.text: Continue catching fish, either Algae type, Seaweed, or any Jelly until the save records 100 successful catches.

achievements.description: Donate 40 different items to the museum.
achievements.summary: Donate @mechanic{40 unique Artifacts or Minerals} to @npc{Gunther} at @loc{the Museum}.

guide.context: An undonated item's inventory description says that Gunther can tell you more about it.

steps.text: Save new Artifacts and Minerals found through mining, geodes, fishing chests, and Artifact Spots.
Visit Gunther between 8:00am and 6:00pm and place each new item in the collection until 40 distinct donations are displayed.

achievements.summary: Complete @mechanic{10 Help Wanted or Special Order requests}; ordinary story quests do not count.

guide.context: Daily Help Wanted jobs appear outside Pierre's and usually expire after the acceptance day plus the next day; failed jobs carry no penalty.

steps.text: Check Pierre's exterior bulletin board for a yellow exclamation point, accept practical jobs, and satisfy the exact journal objective before its deadline.
Deliver the item or speak to the named requester when the journal requires it; supplement progress with Pelican Town or Mr. Qi Special Orders until ten counted completions register.

achievements.summary: Complete @mechanic{40 Help Wanted or Special Order requests}; ordinary story quests do not count.

guide.context: Pelican Town Special Orders refresh on Monday and can run alongside daily Help Wanted jobs, making them useful parallel progress.

steps.text: Keep checking Pierre's Help Wanted board and both unlocked Special Order boards, accepting objectives that fit current resources and access.
Meet each job's collection, delivery, fishing, combat, or shipping condition before its deadline until 40 counted requests are completed.

achievements.summary: Ship @mechanic{15 each of Parsnip, Green Bean, Cauliflower, Potato, Kale, Garlic, Rhubarb, Strawberry, Coffee Bean, Tomato, Hot Pepper, Blueberry, Melon, Wheat, Corn, Radish, Starfruit, Hops, Red Cabbage, Pumpkin, Yam, Eggplant, Cranberry, Grape, Amaranth, Bok Choy, Artichoke, and Beet} through a farm shipping bin.

guide.context: Direct sales to merchants do not count as shipping, and the eligible list excludes flowers and several later crops.

steps.text: For the spring group, ship 15 Parsnips, Green Beans, Cauliflowers, Potatoes, Kale, Garlic, Rhubarb, Strawberries, and Coffee Beans.
For the summer group, ship 15 Tomatoes, Hot Peppers, Blueberries, Melons, Wheat, Corn, Radishes, Starfruit, Hops, and Red Cabbages.
For the fall group, ship 15 Pumpkins, Yams, Eggplants, Cranberries, Grapes, Amaranth, Bok Choy, Artichokes, and Beets.

achievements.summary: Ship @mechanic{300 Parsnips} through a farm shipping bin on one save.

guide.context: Any Polyculture crop qualifies; the five additional choices are Tulip, Ancient Fruit, Summer Spangle, Blue Jazz, and Fairy Rose.

steps.text: Choose a high-yield eligible crop, plant enough seeds across its season or use the Greenhouse or Ginger Island for continued production.
Place every harvest in a shipping bin until 300 units of that same crop have been shipped.

achievements.summary: Fill every slot in @mechanic{Collections > Items Shipped (Farm & Forage)} by shipping one or more of each listed item.

guide.context: Only shipping-bin sales fill this collection; selling an item directly to a merchant does not fill its slot.

steps.text: Open Collections > Items Shipped and use every empty silhouette as a checklist for missing crops, forage, animal goods, artisan goods, and late-game products.
Obtain each missing item and place at least one in a farm shipping bin, then sleep so the overnight shipping summary records it.

achievements.summary: Clear all three stages of @mechanic{Journey of the Prairie King} on the arcade cabinet in @loc{the Stardrop Saloon}.

guide.context: The twin-stick game saves when the next level begins, preserving lives, upgrades, held power-up, and remaining level time for later resumption.

steps.text: Enter the Stardrop Saloon, activate the Journey of the Prairie King cabinet, and use separate movement and shooting controls to defeat each timed enemy wave.
Collect coins and buy useful fire-rate, ammunition, and movement upgrades from the vendor after eligible levels.
Defeat the final boss and finish stage 3; the achievement registers immediately and the arcade system arrives by mail the next day.

achievements.description: Reach the lowest level of the mines.
achievements.summary: Descend through @loc{the Mountain Mines} and enter @loc{floor 120} to obtain the @item{Skull Key}.

guide.context: The Mines open on Spring 5, and an elevator permanently records every fifth floor for later runs.

steps.text: Break rocks or defeat enemies to reveal ladders, use the elevator checkpoints, and continue descending through all 120 floors.
Enter floor 120 and collect the Skull Key from the final floor to trigger the achievement.

achievements.description: Restore the Pelican Town Community Center.
achievements.summary: Complete every @mechanic{Community Center bundle}, then attend the restoration ceremony in @loc{Pelican Town}.

guide.context: @warn{Buying a Joja membership permanently replaces the Community Center route on that save}; reserve a separate save for the Joja achievement.

steps.text: Unlock the Community Center, read the Junimo scroll through the Wizard event, and deliver every item required by all six bundle rooms.
After the final room is restored, enter Pelican Town on a non-rainy, non-festival day and watch the Community Center completion ceremony.

achievements.displayName: Joja Co. Member Of The Year
achievements.description: Become a Joja Co. member and purchase all the community development perks.
achievements.summary: On a separate save, buy a @mechanic{Joja membership and all five Community Development projects}, then attend the Joja ceremony.

guide.context: This route conflicts with Community Center restoration. The membership and all projects cost 140,000g total, and only one project can be purchased per day.

steps.text: Enter JojaMart, pay Morris 5,000g for the membership, sleep, and return to his counter to open the Joja Community Development Form.
Purchase the Bus for 40,000g, Quarry Bridge for 25,000g, Panning for 20,000g, Minecarts for 15,000g, and Greenhouse for 35,000g, sleeping after each day's single purchase.
After the fifth project is completed, enter Pelican Town on a sunny, non-festival day and watch the Joja ceremony.

achievements.summary: Obtain all @mechanic{seven Stardrops} from the Fair, Mines, spouse or Krobus, Sewers, Secret Woods, fishing, and Museum.

guide.context: Each source awards one Stardrop per save; divorcing and remarrying cannot produce another spouse Stardrop.

steps.text: Buy one for 2,000 Star Tokens at the Stardew Valley Fair, open the chest on Mines floor 100, and buy Krobus's 20,000g Stardrop in the Sewers.
Give Old Master Cannoli a Sweet Gem Berry in the Secret Woods and reach 12.5 hearts with a spouse or Krobus as a roommate.
Catch every required fish so Willy mails a Stardrop, and donate all 95 Museum items for Gunther's final Stardrop.

achievements.description: Beat Journey Of The Prairie King without dying.
achievements.summary: Beat @mechanic{Journey of the Prairie King without losing a life}, using level saves and Stardew-day reloads if needed.

guide.context: The arcade autosaves each death and each newly entered level, but a Stardew day reload can restore a checkpoint saved by sleeping before the failed attempt.

steps.text: Clear one arcade level without dying, continue until the next level begins so the cabinet autosaves, then exit the cabinet.
Sleep in Stardew Valley to save that clean arcade checkpoint before attempting the next level.
If a death occurs, quit to the title screen without sleeping, reload the Stardew day, and resume the cabinet from the clean checkpoint; repeat through the final boss.

achievements.description: Get married and have two kids.
achievements.summary: Upgrade the farmhouse twice, marry a villager, keep @mechanic{10 spouse hearts and the nursery crib}, and have two children.

guide.context: After seven married days with the nursery and 10 hearts, each night has about a 5% chance of a child question; the second question waits until the first child becomes a toddler.

steps.text: Complete Farmhouse Upgrade 2, reach 10 hearts with a datable villager, buy the Mermaid's Pendant for 5,000g from the Old Mariner on a rainy day, and give it to that villager.
Maintain at least 10 spouse hearts, leave the crib installed, and accept the nighttime child question; wait 14 days for the first child to arrive.
Wait until the first child reaches the toddler stage, accept the later question for a second child, and wait 14 more days for the second child's arrival.

achievements.summary: Raise any one base skill—@mechanic{Farming, Mining, Foraging, Fishing, or Combat—to level 10}.

guide.context: Temporary food buffs can display levels above the base value but do not satisfy permanent level progression.

steps.text: Keep performing the chosen skill's experience-producing activities, then sleep after enough experience is earned for the level-10 profession screen and achievement.

achievements.summary: Raise @mechanic{Farming, Mining, Foraging, Fishing, and Combat} to permanent level 10.

guide.context: The five skills progress independently, and each level-up is finalized through the overnight level screen.

steps.text: Check the Skills tab and focus daily work on whichever of Farming, Mining, Foraging, Fishing, or Combat remains below level 10.
Earn enough base experience in every skill and sleep after each final increase until all five permanent levels show 10.

achievements.description: Complete all of the Adventure Guild Monster Slayer goals.
achievements.summary: Complete all @mechanic{12 Monster Eradication Goals} tracked inside @loc{the Adventurer's Guild}.

guide.context: The Guild opens after the Initiation quest; its wall list combines eligible kills from Volcano Dungeon, Skull Cavern, and the Mines.

steps.text: Reach 1,000 Slimes, 150 Void Spirits, 200 Bats, 50 Skeletons, 80 Cave Insects, 30 Duggies, and 500 Dust Sprites.
Reach 60 Rock Crabs, 100 Mummies, 50 Pepper Rex, 250 Serpents, and 150 Magma Sprites.
Return to the Adventurer's Guild and inspect the wall list to confirm every goal is complete.

achievements.summary: Find and read each of the @mechanic{19 Power Books}; @warn{Lost Books do not count}.

guide.context: A thumbs-up icon marks a Power Book already read, while the Special Items & Powers tab records the first-reading powers.

steps.text: Audit the 19 Power Book entries and collect their shop, prize, quest, mastery, combat, fishing, mystery-box, and exploration sources.
Hold and use every unread Power Book once until all 19 show the read icon and permanent power entry.

achievements.summary: Unlock the @loc{Movie Theater}, buy a @item{1,000g Movie Ticket}, enter the screening room, and watch one film.

guide.context: The Community Center route builds the theater after the Missing Bundle; the Joja route offers it as a later 500,000g project.

steps.text: Complete the Missing Bundle in abandoned JojaMart after restoring the Community Center, or buy the Movie Theater project after finishing the Joja developments.
Buy one Movie Ticket at the theater counter for 1,000g, enter the screening room, and continue until the movie finishes.

achievements.description: Get 1st place in the Stardew Valley Fair competition.
achievements.summary: At the @loc{Stardew Valley Fair on Fall 16}, submit a nine-item Grange Display and score @mechanic{at least 90 points}.

guide.context: Nine filled slots and at least six represented categories provide strong quantity and diversity bonuses; quality and sale value raise item scores.

steps.text: Bring nine high-quality, high-value items spanning at least six categories, place all nine on the Grange Display, and ask Mayor Lewis to judge it.
Reach 90 or more judging points for first place, then retrieve all nine displayed items before leaving the fair.

achievements.summary: At the @loc{Luau on Summer 11}, add @item{silver-quality Goat Cheese} and receive the @mechanic{Governor's best soup response}.

guide.context: Soup results depend on item quality, base sale price, and edibility; no normal-quality ingredient can produce the best response.

steps.text: Bring one silver-quality Goat Cheese to the Luau on the beach between 9:00am and 2:00pm.
Add the Goat Cheese to the communal soup, speak to Mayor Lewis, choose to start the tasting, and receive the line identifying it as the best soup the Governor has tasted.

achievements.description: Help your forest neighbors grow their family.
achievements.summary: Repair the @loc{Giant Stump west of Marnie's Ranch} with @item{100 Hardwood}, then complete @mechanic{nine raccoon requests}.

guide.context: A strong-wind event first fells the tree; each new request appears seven days after the preceding completion and reflects seasonal artisan goods or resources.

steps.text: After the wind event, inspect the fallen tree in Cindersap Forest, start The Giant Stump quest, and deliver 100 Hardwood to repair the stump.
Return the next day, supply the exact two item groups requested by the raccoon, and repeat after each seven-day wait until nine requests are complete.
After request nine, enter Cindersap Forest on a sunny day and watch the full-family cutscene.

achievements.description: Reach the bottom of the 'dangerous' mines.
achievements.summary: Accept @mechanic{Danger In The Deep} in @loc{Qi's Walnut Room} and reach @loc{Mines floor 120} before the seven-day deadline.

guide.context: The Special Order resets the mine elevator and replaces normal enemies and layouts with dangerous variants for the run.

steps.text: Find 100 Golden Walnuts, enter Qi's Walnut Room, and accept Danger In The Deep from the weekly Special Orders board.
Use bombs, food, ladders, crafted Staircases, and newly restored elevator checkpoints to descend from floor 1 to floor 120 within seven days.
Enter floor 120 while the dangerous condition is active to complete the order and unlock the achievement.

achievements.summary: At the @loc{Volcano Forge}, apply @item{three Galaxy Souls} to one Galaxy weapon in three forges, spending @item{60 Cinder Shards} total.

guide.context: The Forge is on Volcano Dungeon floor 10; the full conversion consumes three Galaxy Souls and 60 Cinder Shards, but the weapon changes only on application three.

steps.text: Obtain a Galaxy Sword by carrying a Prismatic Shard into the Three Pillars in the Desert, or use an available Galaxy Dagger or Galaxy Hammer.
Reach Volcano Dungeon floor 10 with the Galaxy weapon, three Galaxy Souls, and 60 Cinder Shards, then forge one Soul into the weapon three separate times.
After the third forge, take the matching result: Infinity Gavel from the hammer, Infinity Dagger from the dagger, or Infinity Blade from the sword.

achievements.summary: Reach @mechanic{100% Perfection}, sleep once, then enter @loc{the Summit north of the Railroad}.

guide.context: Qi's Walnut Room displays the shared tracker; the Summit path remains blocked until the morning after the score reaches 100%.

steps.text: Ship all 154 Farm & Forage items, cook all 81 recipes, craft all 149 required items, catch all 72 fish, find all 7 Stardrops, and collect all 130 Golden Walnuts.
Build the Earth, Water, Desert, and Island Obelisks plus the Gold Clock; complete all 12 Monster Goals; maximize all 34 required villagers; and reach level 10 in all five skills.
Confirm 100% at the Perfection Tracker, sleep until the distant-rumbling message appears, walk north from the Railroad through the cleared boulder path, and enter the Summit.

achievements.summary: Repair @npc{Willy's boat} with @item{200 Hardwood, 5 Iridium Bars, and 5 Battery Packs}, then ride it to @loc{Ginger Island}.

guide.context: Willy invites the player into the Fish Shop back room only after the Community Center or Joja development route is completed.

steps.text: Finish either town-restoration route, read Willy's invitation, and enter the back room of the Fish Shop.
Repair the hull with 200 Hardwood, the anchor with 5 Iridium Bars, and the ticket stand with 5 Battery Packs, then sleep for the repair cutscene.
Return to the Fish Shop back room the next day, buy a 1,000g boat ticket, and arrive at the Ginger Island dock.
